signals.headline: Mavericks Upgrade Cooper Flagg to AVAILABLE for Sunday's Game vs
signals.raw:
Mavericks Upgrade Cooper Flagg to AVAILABLE for Sunday's Game vs. Raptors** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence[1]

Mavericks announced Cooper Flagg, the Rookie of the Year candidate, is now available after being downgraded to questionable (injury management, no new setback from midfoot sprain) for their Sunday matchup in Toronto against the Raptors[1]. This follows his recent return vs. Orlando Magic

signals.raw:
Elon Musk April Tweets Dominate Polymarket Activity | NO whale bets or tips reported | LOW confidence**

Polymarket's most active markets focus on **Elon Musk tweet counts**, such as "Elon Musk # tweets April 17 - April 24, 2026?" (priced dynamically between 0¢-100¢ reflecting trader probabilities) and "Elon Musk # tweets in April 2026?" with "1120-1159" at 18-28% odds and up to $9M volume[1][2][3
